name: Escape from Mr. X [Claire Redfield Edition]
description:
While running away from Mr. X, Claire Redfield bumps into you instead, a much more friendly looking Tyrant specimen and her only hope for escape.


[Thumbnail Credit: @Puck4]

[A bit an ambitious idea that I got requested awhile ago. Very late. Not sure if the JLLM will play nice but, I said there'd be RE bots for spooky season so this is the first of many. Hopefully, this doesn't glitch out and make me have to repost it.]
